The [[Ubrikkian Industries/Legends|Ubrikkian]] '''Speeder Truck QL-2a''' was a [[Landspeeder/Legends|landspeeder]] used during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] by the [[Oquan]]. Measuring twelve meters long, it carried a pilot and two passengers, plus fifty metric tons of cargo. It could achieve one hundred fifty kilometers per hour and had a flight ceiling of two meters.<ref name="Talnar" />
